aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation for AI visibility with good content and schema usage, but conversational depth and authority signals are lacking.
quick_wins: Expand conversational content to address common HVAC queries in a Q&A format.
Enhance authority signals by showcasing certifications and industry partnerships.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite having FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or repair processes.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service area information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to specific HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting industry certifications and publishing expert-backed articles.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise more visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without conversational content and enhanced authority signals, AI assistants overlook your business for key queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your FAQ content is not leveraging by FAQPage schema, missing out on AI citations.
agency_pitch.solution: We will optimize your schema, expand conversational content, and amplify your authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your expertise.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI visibility; act now to secure your position.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Your HVAC Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI models.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven growth.
